array_types.name: sfTransform_matrix_array
array_types.code: type sfTransform_matrix_array is array (0 .. 8) of aliased float;

record_types.name: sfTransform

subprograms.name: combine
subprograms.code: procedure combine (transform : access sfTransform; other : access constant sfTransform)

subprograms.name: equal
subprograms.code: function equal (left : access sfTransform; right : access sfTransform) return sfBool

subprograms.name: fromMatrix
getInverse
subprograms.code: function getInverse (transform : access constant sfTransform) return sfTransform

subprograms.name: getMatrix
subprograms.code: procedure getMatrix (transform : access constant sfTransform; matrix : access float)

subprograms.name: rotate
subprograms.code: procedure rotate (transform : access sfTransform; angle : float)

subprograms.name: rotateWithCenter
scale
scaleWithCenter
transformPoint
subprograms.code: function transformPoint (transform : access constant sfTransform; point : Sf.System.Vector2.sfVector2f) return Sf.System.Vector2.sfVector2f

subprograms.name: transformRect
subprograms.code: function transformRect (transform : access constant sfTransform; rectangle : Sf.Graphics.Rect.sfFloatRect) return Sf.Graphics.Rect.sfFloatRect

subprograms.name: translate
